title: coreopsis petrophila
intro: Coreopsis petrophila, also known as the pink coreopsis or pink sand coreopsis, is a flowering plant species within the daisy family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The plant has been reported to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system. Coreopsis petrophila can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its usage and effectiveness may vary depending on the specific preparation and individual needs.
